display_text: Pugna Aghanim's Scepter: Life Drain reduces enemy spell damage and amplifies Pugna's spell damage, countering spell-heavy lineups and enhancing his role as a spell damage dealer and suppressor.
search_text: Pugna Aghanim Scepter spell damage reduction amplification anti-magic role change spell suppressor

display_text: Pugna Aghanim's Shard: Life Drain can target Nether Ward, refracting its effect to nearby enemies, countering grouped-up teams and enhancing Pugna's area control and teamfight impact.
search_text: Pugna Aghanim Shard Nether Ward Life Drain area control teamfight refract
